title: About
meta_description: Learn more about Static Website Generator and our mission to make building static websites simple, fast and maintainable.
og_description: Learn more about Static Website Generator and how it simplifies modern static website development.
excerpt: Learn more about Static Website Generator and the philosophy behind the project.
content:
# About

Static Website Generator (SWG) is a modern content management system for building fast, secure and maintainable static websites.

## Our Mission

We believe content should remain independent from presentation. SWG stores content as JSON while Astro focuses on rendering beautiful websites.

## Built for Developers

Themes are standard Astro projects that can be developed locally, packaged and imported directly into SWG.

## Built for Content Teams

Editors can manage pages, blogs, documentation and media without touching code while developers remain in full control over the presentation layer.

## Why Static Websites?

Static websites are fast, secure, scalable and easy to deploy. By separating content from presentation, SWG provides a predictable workflow for both developers and content creators.
